SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.config.server

Class ServerConfig

java.lang.Object
com.mimecast.robin.config.ConfigFoundation
com.mimecast.robin.config.server.ServerConfig
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ServerConfig extends ConfigFoundation
Server configuration.

This class provides type safe access to server configuration.

It also maps authentication users and behaviour scenarios to corresponding objects.

See Also:
  • UserConfig
  • ScenarioConfig
  • Serialized Form

    • getKeyStore

      public String getKeyStore()
      Gets key store.
      Returns:
      Key store path.

    • getKeyStorePassword

      public String getKeyStorePassword()
      Gets key store password.
      Returns:
      Key store password string or path.

    • getPemCertPath

      public String getPemCertPath()
      Gets PEM certificate file path.
      Returns:
      PEM certificate path, or empty string if not configured.

    • getPemKeyPath

      public String getPemKeyPath()
      Gets PEM private key file path.
      Returns:
      PEM private key path, or empty string if not configured.

    • getTrustStore

      public String getTrustStore()
      Gets trust store.
      Returns:
      Trust store path.

    • getTrustStorePassword

      public String getTrustStorePassword()
      Gets trust store password.
      Returns:
      Trust store password string or path.

    • isAllowSelfSigned

      public boolean isAllowSelfSigned()
      Allows accepting self-signed certificates when true. ONLY enable for local testing; never in production.
      Returns:
      Boolean (default: false).

      Gets service endpoint configuration.
      Returns:

      Returns:
      DistributedRateConfig instance.

    • getAdaptiveRateConfig

      public AdaptiveRateConfig getAdaptiveRateConfig()
      Gets adaptive rate limiting configuration.

      This configuration lives inline inside server.json5 under the adaptiveRate key.

      Returns:
      AdaptiveRateConfig instance.

    • getWhitelistConfig

      public WhitelistConfig getWhitelistConfig()
      Gets whitelist configuration.
      Returns:
      WhitelistConfig instance.

      Gets proxy configuration.

      ProxyConfig instance.

      Gets dovecot config.

      Gets Stalwart direct-ingest config. StalwartConfig instance.

      public BasicConfig getClamAV()
      Gets ClamAV config.

      BasicConfig instance.

      public RspamdConfig getRspamd()
      Gets Rspamd config.
      Returns:
      RspamdConfig instance.

    • getPrometheus

      public BasicConfig getPrometheus()
      Gets Prometheus remote write config.
      Returns:
      BasicConfig instance.

    • getUsers

      public UsersConfig getUsers()
      Gets users configuration.
      Returns:
      UsersConfig instance.

    • isChaosHeaders

      public boolean isChaosHeaders()
      Is chaos headers enabled.

      WARNING: This feature is intended for testing purposes only. Do NOT enable in production environments as it allows bypassing normal processing.

      Returns:
      Boolean (default: false).

    • isXclientEnabled

      public boolean isXclientEnabled()
      Is XCLIENT extension enabled.

      WARNING: This feature is intended for development and testing purposes only. Do NOT enable in production environments as XCLIENT allows clients to forge sender information.

      Returns:
      Boolean (default: false).

    • applyMagicToConfig

      private Map<String,Object> applyMagicToConfig(Map<String,Object> config)
      Applies magic replacement to string values in a configuration map.
      Parameters:
      config - Configuration map to process.
      Returns:
      New map with magic replacements applied.

    • getScenarios

      public Map<String,ScenarioConfig> getScenarios()
      Gets scenarios map.
      Returns:
      Scenarios map.

    • getBots

      public BotConfig getBots()
      Gets bot configuration.
      Returns:
      BotConfig instance.

    • loadExternalIfAbsent

      private void loadExternalIfAbsent(String key, Class<?> clazz)
      Helper to lazily load an external JSON5 file into the root config map under the given key if the key is absent and a config directory is available.
      Parameters:
      key - Root key to populate in the map.
      clazz - Class to parse the JSON into (e.g., Map.class, List.class).
